series_metadata.series_description: Files created in the investigation of a noncriminal matter.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for one year after case is closed or until no longer determined to be of evidentiary value, whichever is longer, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for one year after case is closed or until no longer determined to be of evidentiary value, whichever is longer, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
